Services

What We Do

End-to-end GEO services designed specifically for medical practices. From audit to implementation, we help you capture AI-referred patients.

AI Visibility Audit

Comprehensive analysis of your practice's presence across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google SGE.

  • Complete AI platform assessment
  • Competitor visibility analysis
  • Revenue loss calculation
  • 6-page detailed report
FreeRequest Audit

GEO Implementation

Full-stack optimization to capture AI-referred patients before your competitors.

  • Technical schema markup
  • AI-optimized content strategy
  • Knowledge graph authority building
  • Ongoing optimization

Content Creation

AI-answerable content that positions your practice as the authority in your market.

  • Procedure deep-dives
  • FAQ expansions
  • Comparison content
  • Case study documentation

Reputation Management

  • Review generation system
  • Response management
  • Platform optimization

Our Process

01

Discovery

We analyze your current AI visibility, competitors, and market opportunities.

02

Strategy

Custom GEO roadmap designed for your specialty and market.

03

Implementation
